summary: The user is experiencing issues with their wireless mouse, which they have had since 2018, and is considering a replacement. They are also looking to upgrade their laptop backpack, monitor, and improve password management after organizing their digital files in February 2023.
facts: The user has had their wireless mouse since 2018 and is experiencing intermittent connectivity issues and shorter battery life. The user performed maintenance on their desktop computer on February 1, 2023. The user has been using their current laptop backpack daily since January 20, 2023, when it arrived from Amazon. The user did not purchase a monitor on January 25, 2023, due to indecision between two models. The user installed a new graphics card on February 10, 2023. The user spent a few hours on February 5, 2023, creating a new folder structure and moving all their work documents to the cloud, freeing up space on their hard drive.
